description:
2017 Porsche 911 Carrera 4, 3.0 TC F6, 4WD, 370bhp, 7 Speed Auto. AED 249,000 or AED 6,114 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 3 Years. 
 - Mileage only 107,634 KM - Full Porsche Service History - 12 Months Blackline Warranty - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Sports Chrono Package - Apple Car Play - Sports Exhaust - Glass Sunroof - Rear Camera - Keyless Start - Keyless Entry
